children.name: hwOspfv2InterfaceStatisticTable
children.description: Information describes the statistics of the router's attached OSPF interfaces.

children.name: hwOspfv2InterfaceStatisticEntry
children.description: Information describes the statistics of the router's attached OSPF interfaces.

children.name: hwospfv2InterfacePeerDownCount
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of neighbors in Down state on the OSPF interface.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2VLinkTable
nodes.description: Information describes the configured parameters of the router's attached OSPF area vlink.

children.name: hwOspfv2VLinkEntry
children.description: Information describes the configured parameters of the router's attached OSPF areas.

children.name: hwOspfv2PurgeHostName1
children.description: This object indicates the name of an OSPF router which maybe purge OSPF routes.

children.name: hwOspfv2PurgeRouterId3
children.description: This object indicates the 32-bit integer that uniquely identifies the router in the Autonomous System.

children.name: hwOspfv2NbrChgReason
children.description: The reason of the OSPF neighbor state change.

children.name: hwOspfv2PurgeIpAddress1
children.description: This object indicates the IP address of an OSPF router which maybe purge OSPF routes.

children.name: hwOspfv2AffectedNodeNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of affected node when OSPF routes were deleted.

children.name: hwOspfAdjustedCost
children.description: This object indicates Link cost of the current event that triggers OSPF adjustment.

children.name: hwOspfv2PurgeHostName2
children.description: This object indicates the name of an OSPF router which maybe purge OSPF routes.

children.name: hwOspfv2InsecureAuthMode
children.description: This object indicates the name of the insecure authentication mode configured for OSPF.

children.name: hwOspfv2LoopDetectType
children.description: This object indicates the type of the OSPFv2 import route loop detect.

children.name: hwOspfv2PeerFlappingSuppressReason
children.description: The reason of peer flapping suppress status change.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2NeighborTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the configured parameters of the OSPF neighbors attached to the router.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2InterfaceTable
nodes.description: The Interface Table describes the interfaces from the viewpoint of OSPF.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2ProcessTable
nodes.description: Information describes the configured parameters of the router's attached OSPF processes.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2NetworkTable
nodes.description: Information describes the configured parameters of the router's attached OSPF networks.

nodes.name: hwOspfv2AreaTable
nodes.description: Information describes the configured parameters of the router's attached OSPF areas.
